themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents that can perform research tasks autonomously or as part of complex workflows.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that assist developers in writing, reviewing, and understanding code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Tools and platforms designed to aid researchers in various aspects of their work, from data analysis to literature review.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: AI applications focused on condensing large amounts of text or data into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: The application of AI in the creative and investigative processes of design and user research.

themes.name: AI-powered data analysis
themes.description: Utilizing AI to analyze and extract insights from datasets, often for market or user understanding.

themes.name: AI customer insights
themes.description: AI applications that help businesses understand customer behavior, preferences, and sentiment.

themes.name: AI persona generation
themes.description: AI tools and techniques used to create user personas for design and research purposes.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: AI applications that support product managers in strategy, development, and conflict resolution.

themes.name: AI recruitment research
themes.description: The use of AI in understanding labor market trends, hiring, and workforce impacts.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
